raw_title: Joint Statement from OpenAI and Microsoft
raw_content: Microsoft and OpenAI continue to work closely across research, engineering, and product development, building on years of deep collaboration and shared success.
generated_title: OpenAI与Microsoft重申持续深化AI领域合作
generated_summary: 双方表示将继续在研究、工程和产品开发方面紧密合作，延续多年深度协作关系。
